fields.label: Emotion Palette
fields.hint: Choose ONE spoke from the emotion wheel to be your focus

fields.label: The Tell
choices: Strange smells emerge from your mouth (scent lingers)
fields.hint: What gives you away when you use The Voice?

fields.label: The Tell - Custom Description
fields.hint: If you selected 'Something else', describe your Tell here

fields.label: The Performance
fields.initial:
The Performance: When you perform in front of an audience, you can use The Voice to affect them emotionally. The emotion must be from your chosen spoke on the emotion wheel.

Mechanics: Roll CHA + Class Die. On success, the audience feels the emotion you invoke for the duration of your performance and for a short time after.
fields.hint: Reference text for how The Performance works

fields.label: Live at The Witch Trials (Level 4 Automatic)
choices: The Hunters have chosen to ignore you
fields.hint: At level 4, there's a bounty on your head. Why are you still alive?

fields.label: Live at The Witch Trials - Details
fields.hint: Describe the details: Who is your patron? What organisation? What are your duties? Why do hunters ignore you?

fields.label: New Emotion Wheel Spoke
fields.hint: Choose another spoke from the emotion wheel

fields.label: Benefit Choice
fields.hint: Choose one benefit from this advancement

fields.label: Know Your Audience - Target Group
fields.hint: If you chose Know Your Audience: specify the group (e.g., 'Nobles', 'Children', 'Warriors')

fields.label: Know Your Audience - Emotion
fields.hint: If you chose Know Your Audience: which emotion can you reliably provoke in this group?

fields.label: Tell, Don't Show - Circumstances
fields.hint: If you chose Tell, Don't Show: under what circumstances does your Tell no longer manifest?

fields.label: Signature Piece - Spell Name
fields.hint: If you chose Signature Piece: name your signature spell

fields.label: Signature Piece - Risk
fields.hint: If you chose Signature Piece: the Risk value (0-15) of your signature spell

fields.label: Benefit Choice
fields.hint: Choose one benefit from this advancement

fields.label: Henchperson - How Are They Bound?
fields.hint: If you chose Henchperson: how are they bound to you?

fields.label: One Step Ahead
fields.initial:
One Step Ahead: You may ask the GM for a hint about an NPC's emotional state or motivations. The GM must answer truthfully.

This represents your keen understanding of social dynamics and emotional manipulation.
fields.hint: Reference text for this advancement

fields.label: The Gig
fields.initial:
The Gig: You have a regular performance venue or gig that provides you with income and social connections.

Work with your GM to define the venue, audience, and what you perform.
fields.hint: Reference text for this advancement

fields.label: Fanbase
fields.initial:
Fanbase: You have a dedicated following of fans who adore your performances.

Once per session, you can call upon your fans for assistance, information, or cover. The GM determines what help they can reasonably provide.
fields.hint: Reference text for this advancement

fields.label: The Gang
fields.initial:
The Gang: You have a crew of loyal followers who help you with your schemes.

The gang can perform simple tasks, provide backup, or cause distractions. Work with your GM to define the gang's capabilities and limitations.
fields.hint: Reference text for this advancement

fields.label: Emotional Capital
fields.initial:
Emotional Capital: You've built up significant social influence and emotional connections.

Once per session, you can leverage your emotional capital to gain a significant favor, piece of information, or advantage in a social situation.
fields.hint: Reference text for this advancement

fields.label: Carving Out Their Heart
fields.initial:
Carving Out Their Heart: You can use The Voice to permanently alter someone's emotional state or personality.

This is a powerful and dangerous ability. Work with your GM to determine the exact effects and consequences.
fields.hint: Reference text for this advancement

fields.label: Portrait of the Artist as a Monster
Monster Form Description
fields.hint: Describe your monstrous form when you fully embrace your power

fields.label: Monster Traits (Pick 4)
choices: Invulnerable to one common form of harm
Can use The Voice silently with a glance
fields.hint: Select exactly 4 traits for your monster form

fields.label: The Power Behind the Throne
fields.hint: Describe how you've compromised or influenced a Great Power (a ruler, organization, or institution)

fields.label: The Great Dictator
fields.initial:
The Great Dictator: You have achieved the pinnacle of your power as a Dictator.

You can now affect entire crowds or populations with your performances. The scope and scale of your emotional manipulation is limited only by your ambition and the GM's discretion.

However, your Tell becomes more pronounced, and the supernatural nature of your power is increasingly difficult to hide.
fields.hint: Reference text for this advancement - ultimate power achievement
